properties.displayName: Deploy SQL Server Auditing to CSTRM Event Hub
properties.description: Enables the Audit Logs at the SQL server level to stream resource logs to a CSTRM Event Hub
nonComplianceMessages: SQL Server Auditing configuration doesn't meet AA SCCF Benchmark control: SQL Server must have auditing enabled and logs must be forwarded to the approved CSTRM Event Hub.  If you would like to seek an exception for this policy, please reference this guide. https://developer.aa.com/docs/default/component/gaas-policy_as_code
